hooks.command: bash -c 'echo "=== LAST 3 SESSION SUMMARIES ==="; ls -t docs/Progress_Summaries/*_session*.md 2>/dev/null | head -3 | while read f; do echo "--- $f ---"; head -25 "$f"; echo; done; echo; echo "=== RECENT GIT ACTIVITY ==="; git log --oneline -10 2>/dev/null; echo; echo "=== HEALTH CHECK STATE ==="; grep -E "^### \[(HIGH|MEDIUM)\]" docs/Audit/health_check.md 2>/dev/null | head -10; echo; echo "Reading order: CLAUDE.md -> docs/Core/SESSION_PROCEDURES.md -> docs/Core/README.md (only if needed)"'

bash -c 'echo >&2; echo "Session ending. If substantive work was done this session, write a summary to docs/Progress_Summaries/$(date +%Y-%m-%d)_session.md using the template at docs/Progress_Summaries/_template.md. Skip if the session was trivial. Also: did you update execution_manual.md if new CLI was used? Mark roadmap items [x] if completed? Append health_check.md findings? Run sync_docs.py if engines/ files changed?"; exit 0'

bash -c 'path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r .file_path 2>/dev/null); if [[ "$path" == *engines/*.py ]] && [[ -f scripts/sync_docs.py ]]; then python scripts/sync_docs.py 2>&1 | tail -5; fi; exit 0'
